source.snippet: ORLANDO UTILITIES COMMISSION UTILITY EASEMENT RECORDED APRIL 23, 2018, IN OFFICIAL RECORDS INSTRUMENT NO. 20180240207. (AS TO PARCEL 2)

schedule_b_exceptions.text: Defects, liens, encumbrances, adverse claims or other matters, if any, created, first appearing in the public records or attaching subsequent to the effective date hereof but prior to the date the proposed insured acquires for value of record the estate or interest. (Not a survey matter)

source.snippet: 1. DEFECTS, LIENS, ENCUMBRANCES, ADVERSE CLAIMS OR OTHER MATTERS

schedule_b_exceptions.text: Taxes and assessments for the year 2023 and subsequent years, which are not yet due and payable. (Not a survey matter)

source.snippet: 2. TAXES AND ASSESSMENTS FOR THE YEAR 2023 AND SUBSEQUENT YEARS, WHICH ARE NOT YET DUE AND PAYABLE

schedule_b_exceptions.text: Standard exceptions: (A) any encroachment, encumbrance, violation, variation, or adverse circumstance affecting the title that would be disclosed by an accurate and complete land survey (none found); (B) rights of parties in possession; (C) any lien for services, labor, or materials; (D) taxes or assessments not shown as existing liens.

source.snippet: 3. STANDARD EXCEPTIONS: A. ANY ENCROACHMENT, ENCUMBRANCE, VIOLATION, VARIATION...

schedule_b_exceptions.text: Any claim that any portion of the insured land is sovereign lands of the State of Florida, including submerged, filled or artificially exposed lands accreted to such land. (None observed or known to this surveyor)

source.snippet: 4. ANY CLAIM THAT ANY PORTION OF THE INSURED LAND IS SOVEREIGN LANDS OF THE STATE OF FLORIDA

schedule_b_exceptions.text: Any lien provided by county ordinance or by Chapter 159, Florida Statutes, in favor of any city, town, village or port authority for unpaid service charges for service by any water, sewer or gas system. (Not a survey matter)

source.snippet: 5. ANY LIEN PROVIDED BY COUNTY ORDINANCE OR BY CHAPTER 159, FLORIDA STATUTES

schedule_b_exceptions.text: Rights of tenants occupying all or part of the insured land under unrecorded leases or rental agreements. (Not a survey matter)

source.snippet: 6. RIGHTS OF TENANTS OCCUPYING ALL OR PART OF THE INSURED LAND UNDER UNRECORDED LEASES OR RENTAL AGREEMENTS

schedule_b_exceptions.text: Orlando Utilities Commission Utility Easement recorded April 23, 2018, in Official Records Instrument No. 20180240207. (As to Parcel 2) (Affects the subject property for any existing or future utilities that run through, over, across and/or under Lot 2)
